title: Advanced Chromakey
description: This mod adds 16 color chromakey blocks
body: ## ⚡ About Advanced Chromakey — mod that adds chromakey blocks in 16 colors ## 📌 Warning For older versions, up to 1.17, it is recommended to install the [Light Block Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-blocks-from-1-17) add-on ## 🌐 Supported Languages ![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/-English-06?style=for-the-badge&color=000) ![Русский](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Русский-06?style=for-the-badge&color=000) ## 🎨 Screenshots Creative tab with all the blocks (MC version ≤1.18.2) ## 🎬 Video Video review in Russian from [Пафосный Малыш](https://www.youtube.com/@pafosny-malysh) channel ## 💾 Download [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-CurseForge-06?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=000)](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-chromakey) [![modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/-modrinth-06?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=000)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-chromakey)
